steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a modern, accessible settings page for FocusFlow following all the specified requirements.

First, I'll write the HTML file with inline CSS and JavaScript:

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>FocusFlow Settings</title>
    <style>
